title:
Most updated Accredited Employers list with employer's sector
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Most updated Accredited Employers list with employer's sector
Hi there, we are researching about the Accredited Employers in different sectors. Variables like annual number of accredited employers in different sectors and accreditation types in CSV. format would be greatly helpful. Data from 2014 to 2024 (calendar year) is preferred.
understanding the AEWV application opportunities and trends and supporting employment and AEWV application for the ethnic community members.

#### Likely Source Agency
Ministry of Business Innovation and Employment
Dataset already listed
